headline: Jun의 레이더는 noise과 album 신호를 문화 전선에서 동시 추적 중입니다.

stories.title: ‘The Drama’ Review: Her Secret Is His Crisis
stories.summary: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson play a couple upended when one confesses to coming close to committing a horrific crime.

stories.title: Bush: Tiny Desk Concert
stories.summary: If you think you know "Machinehead" and "Glycerine," prepare to be surprised by these Tiny Desk arrangements of beloved alt-rock hits.

stories.title: Olivia Rodrigo Reveals New Album ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’
stories.summary: “I am so proud of this record and I can’t wait for you to hear it,” she says of her third album
